title: Implement
description: Make production code changes with source evidence, no stubs, no toy scaffolding, and targeted validation. Use for feature work, bug fixes, refactors, and generated artifact behavior.
body: Implement the smallest complete production change in the owning package. Use whatever edit mechanism is clearest; patch tools are optional, not mandatory. Python or purpose-built scripts are fine for mechanical refactors when the result is reviewed and validated.
